title: VR Context — Contract 4
description: Pushed by the Unity runtime over /ws/runtime whenever the participant advances to a new step/part of the study session. The dashboard renders whatever fields arrive, so any scene can describe its own context without a fixed schema. Sent after the object-status manifest handshake.

payload.description: Open map of field label → scalar value. Keys are arbitrary; the dashboard prettifies them into labels and preserves order. A conventional 'scene' key, if present, is used to label the recorded event. Each new message fully replaces the previously displayed context.
